title: Budget Planner
description: Full-stack budget planning web application with expense tracking and category-based limits, featuring JWT authentication, email verification, and password reset.

title: Church Website
description: Responsive multi-page website built with React and Vite, featuring clean navigation and cross-device compatibility.

title: Online Grocery Store App
description: Team-built e-commerce application using ASP.NET Core and Entity Framework with cart, product, and user logic tested using xUnit and SOLID principles.

title: Sales Management System for YRLess
description: Java and SQL application for managing telecom sales, including database design, leasing logic, and JSON/XML data parsing.

title: To-do List
description: Task management app with localStorage persistence, built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
